archimate:Representation.name: TRiG
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: TRiG is designed to express RDF data involving multiple named graphs or contexts. It allows the grouping of triples into different graphs, providing a way to differentiate and organize data within an RDF dataset. TRiG syntax is similar to Turtle, but it includes additional features for representing named graphs.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TR/trig/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/TRiGRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/TRiGRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: TRiG is designed to express RDF data involving multiple named graphs or contexts. It allows the grouping of triples into different graphs, providing a way to differentiate and organize data within an RDF dataset. TRiG syntax is similar to Turtle, but it includes additional features for representing named graphs.
